label: The Veilward Chamber
description: The Veilward Chamber is a narrow sleeping cell set behind a blast-rated bulkhead within The Pallid Lantern’s low-vaulted gallery. Ferrocrete ribs and exposed auspex conduit continue through the ceiling spine, while hooded lumen strips enforce the enclave’s cold blackout discipline. A bolted cot-frame and plasteel footlocker occupy the long wall beside a recessed alcove for sealed gear, leaving the floor clear in accordance with armored traffic protocols. The air remains dry and filtered through vent grilles fitted with dust baffles, carrying the permanent tang of scrubbed metal and recirculated heat.
